summary: Tested new features: Tax Calendar with ATO deadlines, Bank Feeds with Plaid sandbox, Accounting Integrations with Xero/MYOB OAuth sandbox, and sidebar navigation updates. All major features working correctly. Sidebar scroll position preservation has a timing issue.

issues: Sidebar scroll position resets to 0 after page navigation despite useRef implementation - timing issue with scroll restoration

passed_tests: Tax Calendar page (/tax-calendar) loads correctly with title 'Tax Planning Calendar'
Tax Calendar has Calendar, Upcoming, All Events tabs
Tax Calendar shows BAS deadlines (Q1-Q4)
Tax Calendar shows Super Guarantee deadlines (Q1-Q4)
Tax Calendar shows PAYG Installment deadlines (Q1-Q4)
Tax Calendar shows Tax Return deadlines (Individual, Agent, Company)
Tax Calendar shows FBT deadlines (Return, Q1-Q3 Installments)
Tax Calendar has category filter buttons (All, BAS, Super, PAYG, Tax Return, FBT, Important, CGT, Custom)
Tax Calendar fetches from /api/notifications/tax-deadlines API
Bank Feeds page (/bank-feeds) loads correctly with title 'Bank Feeds'
Bank Feeds shows Sandbox Mode notice with Plaid Australia link
Bank Feeds Connect Bank button opens bank selection modal
Bank Feeds shows all 8 Australian banks: CommBank, Westpac, NAB, ANZ, Macquarie, ING, Bendigo, Bankwest
Bank Feeds sandbox connection works - connects to Commonwealth Bank
Bank Feeds displays mock accounts after connection (Smart Access, NetBank Saver)
Bank Feeds shows Total Balance, Connected Banks, Total Accounts, Transactions summary cards
Bank Feeds has Accounts and Transactions tabs
Bank Feeds has Import Balances to Budget button
Accounting Integrations page (/accounting-integrations) loads correctly
Accounting Integrations shows OAuth Sandbox Mode notice
Accounting Integrations shows Xero card with features (Invoices, Bank Feeds, Contacts, Reports, BAS, Payroll)
Accounting Integrations shows MYOB card with features (Accounts, Banking, Contacts, Reports, Payroll, Inventory)
Accounting Integrations Connect Xero button works - simulates OAuth flow
Accounting Integrations Connect MYOB button available
Accounting Integrations displays mock Xero data after connection (Wheeler Family Trust, ABN, accounts)
Accounting Integrations shows Synced Data Preview with accounts table
Accounting Integrations has Production Setup instructions for Xero
Accounting Integrations has Production Setup instructions for MYOB
Sidebar has DATA & INTEGRATIONS section
Sidebar has Bank Feeds link with data-testid='nav-bank-feeds'
Sidebar has Xero / MYOB link with data-testid='nav-accounting-integrations'
Routes /bank-feeds and /accounting-integrations are properly configured in App.js
action_items: Fix sidebar scroll position preservation - current useEffect timing may need requestAnimationFrame or setTimeout to ensure DOM is ready before restoring scroll position
critical_code_review_comments: BankFeeds.jsx properly implements Plaid sandbox mode with Australian banks and mock account data
AccountingIntegrations.jsx properly implements Xero/MYOB OAuth sandbox with mock organisation and account data
TaxCalendar.jsx has comprehensive AUSTRALIAN_TAX_DATES array with BAS, Super, PAYG, Tax Return, FBT deadlines
Layout.jsx sidebar scroll preservation logic exists but has timing issue - scrollPositionRef.current may be restored before DOM is ready
All new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
All integrations clearly marked as SANDBOX mode with production setup instructions

success_rate.frontend: 98% (All features working, minor sidebar scroll issue)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and mock data defined in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested new features: 1) Tax Calendar at /tax-calendar shows all ATO deadlines (BAS Q1-Q4, Super Q1-Q4, PAYG Q1-Q4, Tax Return, FBT) with Calendar/Upcoming/All Events tabs and category filters, 2) Bank Feeds at /bank-feeds with Plaid sandbox showing 8 Australian banks (CommBank, Westpac, NAB, ANZ, Macquarie, ING, Bendigo, Bankwest) - sandbox connection creates mock accounts, 3) Accounting Integrations at /accounting-integrations with Xero/MYOB OAuth sandbox - shows mock organisation data and accounts after connection, includes Production Setup instructions, 4) Sidebar has DATA & INTEGRATIONS section with Bank Feeds and Xero/MYOB links. Minor issue: sidebar scroll position resets on navigation despite useRef implementation.

mocked_apis.Plaid Link: SANDBOX - connects to mock Australian bank accounts
mocked_apis.Xero OAuth: SANDBOX - simulates OAuth flow with mock Wheeler Family Trust data
mocked_apis.MYOB OAuth: SANDBOX - simulates OAuth flow with mock Wheeler Property Holdings data

Sandbox Mode notice with Plaid Australia link
